'''Grissuk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who initially worked for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] before he switched his allegiance to [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla Besadii the Elder]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Jabba placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head for his disloyalty and it was collected by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who [[Death/Legends|killed]] Grissuk for 3,000 credits.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
